title: The Growing Influence of Social Media
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Social media has (0) widely changed how people communicate and share information. Every day, millions of posts are shared across platforms, creating a powerful (17) connection between users from different countries. Unfortunately, (18) unreliable content can spread rapidly, as many users share posts without checking facts. In spite of this, genuine (19) friendship can form through online communities built around shared interests. For businesses, social media offers an (20) inexpensive way to reach large audiences worldwide. Young users must behave (21) responsibly online, as careless comments can have lasting negative effects. Research shows that heavy use of social media is linked to increased feelings of (22) depression and (23) loneliness, particularly among teenagers. Experts therefore encourage greater (24) awareness of these risks and recommend limiting daily screen time to protect mental wellbeing.

example.text: Social media has (0) WIDELY changed how people communicate and share information. (WIDE)

questions.explanation: A noun is needed after 'powerful'; 'connect' becomes 'connection' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
A negative adjective is needed; the prefix 'un-' and suffix '-able' are added to the root form to describe content that cannot be trusted.
A noun is needed after 'genuine'; 'friend' becomes 'friendship' by adding the suffix '-ship'.
A negative adjective is needed; the prefix 'in-' is added to 'expensive' (derived from 'expense') to mean 'not costly'.
An adverb is needed to modify 'behave'; 'responsible' becomes 'responsibly' by changing '-le' to '-ly'.
A noun is needed after 'feelings of'; 'depress' becomes 'depression' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
A noun is needed after 'feelings of'; 'lonely' becomes 'loneliness' by changing '-y' to '-iness'.
A noun is needed after 'greater'; 'aware' becomes 'awareness' by adding the suffix '-ness'.
